column1: # After s27 validates MATRIX_LR=0.042 peak on AGX.
# This sweep tunes two switches that Phase A multi-switch fork will target:
#   - TTT_LR bracket at 500 steps with quant_bpb (prior art says ~0.001 but needs confirm)
#   - ENABLE_LOOPING_AT bracket (0.25, 0.45, 0.55) to check if current 0.35 is actually optimal
#     and set priors for Phase A fork
# If static 0.35 beats 0.25/0.45/0.55, fork just automates - less exciting.
# If static values are flat, fork has room to find data-dependent optima.
